case_title: MEI CAI KUANG VS. ERIC WAI MING WONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED APR-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ERIC WAI MING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JDUGE PRO TEM RUSSEL DAVIS FILED BY KUANG, MEI CAI WONG, ERIC WAI MING
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUANG, MEI CAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, ERIC WAI MING $1,906.60 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,011.60, THE EVIDENCE PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT SHOWS THAT IMPACT EXCEEDED 5 M.P.H. IT IS THE COURT'S OPINION THAT DEFENDANT WAS DRIVING TOO FAST FOR CONDITIONS AND FAILED TO STOP IN TIME. PLAINTIFF IS AWARED HER COSTS, PLUS DEDUCTIBLE, PLUS MEDICAL EXPENSES. NO GENERAL DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ERIC WAI MING
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KUANG, MEI CAI AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ERIC WAI MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
